title: zeylanidium manasiae
intro: Zeylanidium manasiae, also known as the 'Katu Panai' or 'Wild Cardamom', is a species of flowering plant in the family Zingiberaceae. It is native to Sri Lanka and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in compounds like zeylanone and zeylanal, which are believed to contribute to its health benefits, including relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and immune system enhancement. Herbal preparations of Zeylanidium manasiae include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
